rationale: Builds directly on the current best soft quant-aware projection ramp, but changes when late roundtrip noise is injected rather than trying another offset/midpoint quantizer variant. Intermediate quant-aware snaps now skip tensors whose exact final roundtrip would barely change them, using a short threshold ramp so early endgame updates focus on genuinely quantization-sensitive weights while the final pre-save roundtrip remains exact. This keeps the objective aligned to final_int8_zlib_roundtrip_exact val_bpb, avoids extra hot-loop cost, and stays lean enough to remain under the 1500-line script cap.
title: Error-Gated Quant-Aware Projection Ramp
